_doc: Auto-generated by generate_scenario.py — review fixtures + add expected_calls. Match strings intentionally omit `--output json` so the recorded discovery path resolves deterministically whether or not the agent appends the flag (substring match, first wins); without this, a missing-flag call falls through to the permissive empty-[] default and the agent abandons discovery.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched by `rules` returns an empty array. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
